pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the build environment enforces JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade MapStruct version to 1.5.5.Final to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Lombok.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older MapStruct versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support for newer bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Compiler Plugin to version 3.12.1 to support Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the compiler plugin may not correctly handle Java 21 bytecode or features, leading to compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Reorder annotation processor paths to place Lombok before MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Lombok must run before MapStruct to ensure that Lombok-generated getters/setters are visible to MapStruct during compilation; otherwise, MapStruct may fail to find methods.
